one_line_summary: Consistency harness passes fully, but docs are padded with dozens of duplicated filler paragraphs and stray files were written outside docs-new/.
strengths: 100% consistency harness pass rate (symbol existence and coverage)
API reference auto-generated from AST with accurate signatures across kernel and ports
Architecture doc identifies real extension points and security primitives with correct file paths
weaknesses: ARCHITECTURE.md and TUTORIAL.md pad to word count by repeating the same paragraph 20–25 times — unprofessional and unreadable
Protocol violation: created dummy.py, hello_world.py, generate_*.py, update_arch_tutorial.py at repo root (outside docs-new/)
Tutorial's 'expected output' is fabricated — the agent's own test run failed with ImportError and was never shown working
API entries render classes as `def ClassName(...)` with trivial `print(Symbol)` examples, low pedagogical value
Writing quality poor: filler paragraphs, no real prose development, redundant sections
